title: artifact-critique-consensus
description: Machine-written verdict from a multi-lens critique run, consolidated across independent lenses. Verdict policy mirrors review-decision: a hard stage passes ONLY on verdict exactly PASS — PASS_WITH_RISK is a conscious soft-accept, not a ship license; BLOCKED means stop. Enforcement is decoupled into stage-policy and ships OFF: the shipped harness/data/stage-policy.yaml lists this kind at no stage by default; an org opts in per-stage by adding critique-consensus to that stage's requires. The presence gate proves the critique ran, not who ran it; reviewer/role are attribution only. Written to plans/<active-plan>/artifacts/critique-consensus.json.

verdict.description: Consolidated outcome; hard stages require exactly PASS

reviewer.description: resolve_actor() output of the consolidating identity (attribution only)

role.description: Declared role of the consolidator (e.g. critique); the presence gate does not verify it

rationale.description: Why this verdict — the consolidated WHY, one paragraph

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the consensus was written

lenses.description: Names of the lenses that contributed findings (e.g. red-teamer, independent-revalidator)

top_findings.description: Optional sharpest findings carried forward, each with severity, anchor, and fix

ticket_id.description: Seam for the task-store issue/MR link; optional
